headline: Why you should buy the Google-related pullback in memory stocks
summary: Investing.com -- Memory stocks declined Wednesday as investors reacted to Google’s announcement of TurboQuant, a new compression algorithm designed to reduce memory requirements for AI systems, even as the broader technology sector posted gains.

headline: MU, WDC, SNDK fall: Why Google’s TurboQuant is rattling memory stocks
summary: Investing.com -- Memory stocks fell Wednesday despite broader technology sector strength, with shares dropping after Google unveiled TurboQuant, a new compression algorithm that could reduce memory requirements for AI systems.

headline: Western Digital’s Long Contracts Recast AI Storage Growth And Valuation
summary: Western Digital has secured new long term purchase commitments for high capacity storage from key customers, extending into 2027 and 2028. The agreements build on previously disclosed 2026 commitments and shift more of the business onto multi year contracts. The move reflects growing demand tied to AI and hyperscale data centers and gives Western Digital greater visibility on future supply needs. Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) is stepping into this new phase with a share price of $301.05,...
